summary: Unified Employee Dossier feature tested. All 7 tabs working (Календар, Отчети, Заплати, Обекти, Заеми, Присъствия, Фишове). Deep linking with ?tab= parameter working for reports, payroll-weeks, advances. AllReportsPage 'Досие' tab worker picker navigates to /employees/:id?tab=reports. PersonnelTodayCard worker name click navigates to /employees/:id. Fixed calendar endpoint 500 error.

minor.issue: 500 error due to NoneType.get() - FIXED by testing agent

seed_data_creation: None - used existing worker Светлин Антонов (6f69367a-e25f-489d-a7c8-f25cde6a9ac5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Employee Dossier feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) /employees/:id page has 7 tabs with data-testids: tab-calendar, tab-reports, tab-payroll-weeks, tab-projects, tab-advances, tab-attendance, tab-payroll. 2) Deep linking works: ?tab=reports, ?tab=payroll-weeks, ?tab=advances all open correct tabs. 3) Dossier summary cards show: total hours, earned EUR, paid EUR, reports count. 4) Reports tab shows report lines with date, project link, SMR, hours, overtime, value, status, payroll status. 5) Payroll weeks tab shows weekly history with gross/net/status/totals row. 6) Advances tab shows advances/loans with amount/remaining/status. 7) AllReportsPage has 4 tabs: Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати, Досие. 8) Досие tab shows worker picker with search and avatar cards. 9) Clicking worker card navigates to /employees/:id?tab=reports. 10) PersonnelTodayCard worker name click navigates to /employees/:id. 11) Fixed calendar endpoint 500 error in hr.py line 948.

unified_dossier_page: 7 tabs present: Календар, Отчети, Заплати, Обекти, Заеми, Присъствия, Фишове
data-testids: employee-detail-page, tab-calendar, tab-reports, tab-payroll-weeks, tab-projects, tab-advances, tab-attendance, tab-payroll
Dossier summary cards: dossier-summary-cards (39h, 631 EUR, 275 EUR paid, 6 reports)

Payroll status badges: Платен, В пакет
payroll_weeks_tab: Columns: Седмица, Дни, Часове, Брутно, Бонуси, Удръжки, Нетно, Статус
ОБЩО totals row with Платено amount
advances_tab: Columns: Вид, Дата, Сума, Остатък, Статус, Бележка
all_reports_page_dossier_tab: 4 tabs: Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати, Досие
Досие tab shows worker picker with search (dossier-search)
Worker cards (worker-cards) with avatar, name, position

bug_fixed.issue: NoneType object has no attribute 'get' in calendar endpoint
bug_fixed.fix: Changed condition order to check if attendance exists before accessing .get('status')
